title: Network Token Credential
description: A card credential whose verification scheme is a per-transaction cryptogram and Electronic Commerce Indicator. Used for network-tokenized PANs (merchant tokens, wallet-provisioned DPANs, processor-issued network tokens). The agent selects this credential when the underlying instrument provides cryptographic verification; it selects `card_credential` instead when the verification is a CVC, regardless of whether the PAN itself is an FPAN or a token.

type.description: The credential type identifier for network token credentials.

expiry_month.description: The month of the card's expiration date (1-12).

expiry_year.description: The year of the card's expiration date.

constraint.title: Network Token Credential Constraint
constraint.description: Constraint entry for the `network_token` credential type.
